workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} and language MUST be tailored to {user_skill_level}
Execute ALL steps in exact order; do NOT skip steps
This workflow displays session status - NO code implementation

step.action: Determine story_key from parameter or auto-discover

check.output:
❌ Error: No dev sessions found
No active dev sessions in {{dev_session_root}}.
Please create a dev session first by running: `/bmad-bmm-dev-story-analyze --story-file=`

check.action: Use most recently modified dev session (by session.yaml last_updated)

check.output:
❌ Error: Session file not found
Session file expected at: {{session_file}}

step.action: Parse session.yaml to extract: - story_key - story_path - story_title - current_task - total_tasks - status - plan_version - replan_reason - allows_auto_replan - created - last_updated

check.output:
⚠️ Warning: Implementation plan not found
Plan file expected at: {{plan_file}}
⚠️ Warning: Context handoff file not found

step.critical: Calculate session progress metrics using enhanced task_status data
step.action:
Check if session.yaml has enhanced tracking (completed_tasks array):
Use enhanced tracking method: - completed_tasks = length of completed_tasks array - Extract task_status for each completed task - Calculate files_changed = sum of files_created + files_modified across all tasks - Calculate total_exports = sum of exports count across all tasks
Use legacy method: - Count progress files matching pattern: {{progress_files_pattern}} - completed_tasks = count of progress files

Calculate metrics: - completed_tasks = count from above - progress_percentage = (completed_tasks / total_tasks) * 100 - Determine current task: - If enhanced tracking: first task where task_status.N.status != "completed" - If legacy: completed_tasks + 1
Build completed tasks timeline: - For each completed task: - Task number - Task name (from plan.md) - Completion timestamp (from task_status.N.completed_at) - Files changed count - Exports count
Identify blocked/pending tasks: - For each incomplete task in plan.md: - Check dependencies from plan - Mark as "blocked" if dependencies not met - Mark as "ready" if dependencies are met

Determine session state: - If completed_tasks == 0 and status == "analyzed": State = "Ready to start" - If completed_tasks > 0 and completed_tasks < total_tasks: State = "In progress" - If completed_tasks == total_tasks: State = "All tasks completed" - If status == "ready-for-dev" and completed_tasks == total_tasks: State = "Ready for completion" - If replan_reason is NOT empty: State = "Needs replan" - If status == "done": State = "Completed"

check.action: Extract verification results: - Test status (passed/failed/warning) - Lint status (passed/failed/warning) - Build status (passed/failed/warning) - Overall verification status
Verification file not found - no verification run yet

step.action: Set output format based on format parameter:

check.action: Set mode to short output (single line)

check.critical: Output JSON format with enhanced tracking
Output short format (single line) with enhanced metrics
Output formatted status with enhanced tracking details

step.output:
✅ **Status displayed** (format: {{output_format}})
**Quick Commands:** • View formatted status: `/bmad-bmm-dev-session-status --story-key={{story_key}}` • View JSON status: `/bmad-bmm-dev-session-status --format=json --story-key={{story_key}}` • View short status: `/bmad-bmm-dev-session-status --format=short --story-key={{story_key}}`
**For help:** Run `/bmad-help` to see all available workflows and commands.
